name: Plaka Greek Salad (Weir)
recipeIngredient: Coarse salt and freshly ground pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the tomatoes, onion, peppers, and cucumber on a serving plate.
2. Drizzle with olive oil and vinegar. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Crumble the feta cheese over the top, distributing it evenly. Sprinkle the olives and oregano over the salad and serve immediately.
Serves 8.
